name: perf-kp-sql
description: Kunpeng + MongoDB/MySQL/Redis joint perf diagnosis. SSH-based collection + 411 baseline rules + sqlite RAG knowledge base + flamegraph integration. Harness-agnostic (Anthropic Agent Skills standard).

interface.longDescription: SSH-based remote collection (50 OS metrics + per-engine runtime), evaluates 411 baseline rules against a sqlite knowledge base (FTS5 trigram + sqlite-vec 384-dim semantic search), and emits an impact-ranked HTML report with authoritative citations. First-time use: run /perf-kp-sql-setup to install native deps.
defaultPrompt: 诊断 mongo 数据库性能问题: host=10.0.0.1 user=root privateKeyPath=~/.ssh/id_ed25519 engine=mongo
